subcodes.first_line: O my loving friends! Glad tidings have reached me that these gracious, fair-faced friends have become fragrant as musk and faithful to their promises [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران دلجوی من مژده رسید که دوستان مه رو خوشخو گشتند و مشکبو و وفاجو یعنی
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @praise and encouragement, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
